name: Reverse-breadboard: 5 core subsystem wiring
description: docs/shaping.md traces actual wiring of Vault Mutation (two paths, ActionHistory dead code), Persistence (dual save, 3-failure lockout, silent errors), Image Serving (TILE_REQUEST severed, tiles disabled, OPFS 1s race), Undo/Redo (2 of 10+ paths record history), View Rendering (200ms debounce, 4/7 null guards, 16 prop drill, 10 overlapping effects). Affordance tables + Mermaid diagrams for each subsystem. 10 severed wires cataloged in cross-subsystem summary.
